Know before you go

  • It's free. No tickets, no registration — just show up. Bring friends and kids.
  • Sauna-curious? Towels and a wash-off station are provided. Bring a change of clothes.
  • Come hungry-ish. Clean shaved ice and coffee-syrup tastings all morning.
  • Parking is free on site at 5382 Cox-Smith Rd.
  • Giveaways: five lab-test prizes. Showing up gets you an entry, bringing a friend doubles it — and your friend gets an extra entry too.
  • Meet Dr. Ryan and tour the new clinic — we're celebrating one year of doing health differently in Mason.
THE WELLNESS WAY · MASON

5382 Cox-Smith Rd, Suite A · Mason, OH 45040
